item.title: Murky outlook for businesses after tariff ruling prompts countermoves by Trump
item.description: Businesses face a new wave of uncertainty after the Supreme Court struck down tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump under an emergency powers law ...

item.title: US audit finds gaps in the FAA's oversight of United Airlines maintenance
item.description: A federal government audit says FAA staffing shortages and high employee turnover have hindered the agency's oversight of airplane maintenance at Unit...

item.title: Saudi Arabia may have uranium enrichment under proposed deal with US, arms control experts warn
item.description: Saudi Arabia could have some form of uranium enrichment within the kingdom under a proposed nuclear deal with the United States

item.title: Japan's traditional kimonos are being repurposed in creative and sustainable ways
item.description: The kimono is getting a vibrant remake in Japan

item.title: Asian shares are mixed, US futures edge higher as AI fears drag Wall Street lower
item.description: Shares are mixed in Asia as worries over risks linked to massive investments in artificial intelligence and a potential U.S.-Iran conflict weigh on ma...
